text: One hour of Elena’s voice on the radio, reading Palomar by Italo Calvino (in italian) Special ✨

Achtung achtung achtung!
A change in the programme this evening! We start with the first episode of Permacultural Cartographies at 19:00!
And Elena’s show Disegno in suono starts at 21:00, so we can go to bed early 💛
